name: Voxel Builder
description: Construct your content block by block in this retro 3D world.
css: body { background-color: #5B8930; background-image: linear-gradient(45deg, #4A7325 25%, transparent 25%, transparent 75%, #4A7325 75%, #4A7325), linear-gradient(45deg, #4A7325 25%, transparent 25%, transparent 75%, #4A7325 75%, #4A7325); background-size: 64px 64px; background-position: 0 0, 32px 32px; background-attachment: fixed; } .card, .panel, .surface, .bg-theme-surface { border: 4px solid #555555 !important; border-top-color: #ffffff !important; border-left-color: #ffffff !important; box-shadow: inset 2px 2px 0px rgba(255,255,255,0.5), inset -2px -2px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 8px 8px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.5) !important; background-color: #c6c6c6 !important; } .sidebar { border-right: 4px solid #111 !important; box-shadow: inset -4px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } .header { border-bottom: 4px solid #555555 !important; border-bottom-color: #555 !important; } .btn-primary, .btn-secondary { border: 4px solid #000 !important; border-top-color: #fff !important; border-left-color: #fff !important; border-bottom-color: #555 !important; border-right-color: #555 !important; box-shadow: inset 2px 2px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.3), inset -2px -2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.2) !important; } .btn-primary { background-color: #3be3e3 !important; color: #000 !important; text-shadow: 1px 1px 0px rgba(255,255,255,0.5); } .btn-primary:active { border-top-color: #555 !important; border-left-color: #555 !important; border-bottom-color: #fff !important; border-right-color: #fff !important; background-color: #2bb5b5 !important; } ::selection { background-color: #55ff55; color: #000; } input, select, textarea { background-color: #000000 !important; color: #ffffff !important; border: 4px solid #555555 !important; border-top-color: #333 !important; border-left-color: #333 !important; border-bottom-color: #fff !important; border-right-color: #fff !important; box-shadow: inset 4px 4px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.8) !important; } input:focus, select:focus, textarea:focus { outline: 2px solid #ffffff !important; box-shadow: inset 4px 4px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.8) !important; } ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 16px; background: #3c2a1e; border-left: 4px solid #111; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #c6c6c6; border: 4px solid #555; border-top-color: #fff; border-left-color: #fff; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: #ffffff; } .border-l-4.shadow-theme { background-color: #c6c6c6 !important; } [class*="bg-theme-danger/10"].shadow-theme { background-color: #ff5555 !important; color: #ffffff !important; }
